reply.text: My therapist is gonna ask why one hike ruined my standards forever

messages.text: my self control slipped on that trail and died
it saw the whole forest side quest and logged out
be serious, you didnt notice the trees
i noticed them holding on better than my morals
the trees survived fire, you survived thirst
you are bold, i am still bored
therapist first, she needs context for this selfie
context is i touched grass and men folded
i've been on your page for a minute tbh
dramatic, it was literally a 2 mile loop
yeah and my dignity did 47 miles
dignity shouldve stayed in the parking lot honestly 😳
wednesday at 9. i'll handle the rest
